listing.product_description:
TLAPS 16 oz Walk-N-Dip Paper Snack Trays are the concession industry's go-to format - and this 1000-count case is the volume buy that runs a Friday-night game or a Saturday matinee without a re-order.

1000 TRAYS PER CASE: One case typically runs a full game-day or matinee shift at a mid-volume stand. Lower per-tray cost than smaller cases, less reordering churn.

Order this case for predictable supply, no-surprise quality and the kind of pricing that protects your food cost margin.

listing.product_description:
TLAPS 3-Compartment Aluminum Foil Trays with Paper Board Lids deliver the plate-style bento meal pan for caterers, ghost kitchens, school cafeterias, and meal-prep operators serving entree-and-two-sides meals off-premise.

3-COMPARTMENT BENTO LAYOUT: Built-in molded partitions separate entree from two sides - no cross-contamination of sauces, no sogging of crispy fries against wet entrees, no mixed flavors. Plate-style presentation in a single foil pan with one paperboard lid that covers all three compartments.

PRECISE 10 X 9.25 X 1.625 INCH FOOTPRINT: Sized for a substantial entree-and-two-sides meal - protein plus rice plus vegetables, or burger plus fries plus slaw, or chicken plus mac plus green beans. Fits standard delivery hot bags and chafer racks.

250 PAN-AND-LID SETS PRE-PAIRED: Every pan in the case ships with its matching paperboard lid. No orphan inventory at the end of the case, no scramble for lids mid-rush, no mismatched sets.

HEAVY-GAUGE COMMERCIAL ALUMINUM: Restaurant-gauge aluminum alloy holds rigid shape under a fully loaded hot meal, transfers heat evenly in convection and conventional ovens, and survives stacked transport in insulated delivery bags without warping.

OVEN, FREEZER, AND HOT-WELL SAFE: Tolerates the full back-of-house temperature range - direct oven baking, blast chill, freezer storage, hot-well hold, convection oven reheat.

PAPERBOARD LID FOR TRANSPORT: Each paperboard lid seats firmly over the three-compartment pan rim for spill-resistant carry-out, accepts marker or label for date and customer info, and resists collapse during stacked transport.

WHO USES IT: catering operations serving entree-and-two-sides meals, third-party delivery bento boxes, hospital tray service, school and college cafeteria batch meal service, meal-prep subscription kitchens, hotel banquet pre-stage, ghost kitchens running bento programs, prepared-foods grocery coolers.
